mapper.select: SELECT re.id, re.supplier_id, re.indicator_id, re.risk_dimension, re.description, re.status, re.triggered_at, re.source_url FROM risk_event re WHERE re.supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY re.triggered_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'open') AS open, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'confirmed') AS confirmed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'processing') AS processing, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'closed') AS closed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'dismissed') AS dismissed FROM risk_event
